response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:19: Comedic intro banter detected. No vocal music. \n2. 00:46-04:46: Vocal performance of 'JANE DOE' detected. The video screen shows 'JANE DOE' and '作詞・作曲：來律玄師' (a pun on Kenshi Yonezu). Searches confirmed no official lyrics exist online for this specific VTuber performance variation, so lyrics were transcribed directly from the audio/video. \n3. 04:46-05:00: Post-performance segment. No vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video from the 'Aki Rosenthal Birthday Festival 2026' featuring a duet vocal performance of a song titled 'JANE DOE' by two VTubers, with a comedic introduction and ending. The song appears to be an original or a specific cover performance created for this event.

scenes.description: Introductory segment with comedic banter between the performers before the song.
Performance of the song 'JANE DOE'. The lyrics are transcribed from the video.
